brand.title: Instagram Relationship Analyzer
brand.trust: No login • No tracking • No data stored

hero.headline: See who follows you back–and who doesn’t
hero.description: Load your Instagram data and get a clear follower breakdown in seconds. Everything stays on your device.

upload.title: Drop your Instagram ZIP file here
upload.description: Nothing is uploaded. Your data is processed locally in your browser. Drag and drop your ZIP file or choose it below.
upload.parsing: Parsing the archive locally. Large exports may take a moment.

results.placeholder: Your results will appear here after you load your data.

relationships.label: No Followback
relationships.emptyLabel: Everyone in this list follows you back already.

relationships.label: Fans
relationships.emptyLabel: No fans detected in this export.

relationships.label: Mutuals
relationships.emptyLabel: There are no mutual follows in this export.

guide.title: How to export your Instagram data

slides.title: Open Your Information
slides.description: Go to Accounts Center in your settings → Your information and permissions.

slides.title: Select Data
slides.description: Choose Followers and following, set Date range to All time, and Format to JSON.

slides.title: Download File
slides.description: Once ready, download the ZIP file to your device.
